assertions.assertion: The code uses .WithReplicas(3) on the IdentityServer project resource
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WithReplicas(3)` on the IdentityServer project.

assertions.assertion: The response mentions shared signing keys (ISigningKeyStore or equivalent) as a requirement
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section explains shared ISigningKeyStore requirement and warns against file-based signing keys.

assertions.assertion: The response mentions shared ASP.NET Data Protection keys as a requirement
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section explains shared Data Protection keys with specific storage options (Redis, DB, Azure Blob).

assertions.assertion: The response mentions shared operational store (persisted grants, device codes, or server-side sessions) as a requirement
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section covers shared operational store for persisted grants, device codes, and server-side sessions.

assertions.assertion: The response warns against using file-based signing keys or in-memory stores with multiple replicas
assertions.rationale: Explicitly warns: 'Do NOT use file-based signing keys' and 'If using in-memory stores, grants created on one replica won't be visible to another'.
